zh.lifeSummary: 當Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie於大約1330年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛賀布時，他的父親John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean51歲，母親Cumming32歲。他於大約1350年與Christina MacLeod在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1408年在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛賀布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie于大约1330年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛賀布时，他的父亲John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean51岁，母亲Cumming32岁。他于大约1350年与Christina MacLeod在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1408年在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾洛賀布。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

nameMeanings.name: ‘Eachann
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic form of Hector.

en.lifeSummary: When Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie was born about 1330, in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, was 51 and his mother, Cumming, was 32. He married Christina MacLeod about 1350, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie est né environ 1330, à Lochbuie, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Cumming, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Christina MacLeod environ 1350, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Lochbuie, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie um 1330 in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean 51 und seine Mutter Cumming 32. Er hat um 1350 in Scotland Christina MacLeod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1408 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Christina MacLeod circa 1350, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie(이)가 대략 1330년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Cumming(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 스컷랜드에서 Christina MacLeod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1408년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 럭버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Cumming, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina MacLeod aproximadamente 1350, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie родился около 1330 г. в местности лочбуи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Cumming, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina MacLeod около 1350 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности лочбуи, аргилл, Шотландия.

Se casó con Christina MacLeod aproximadamente 1350, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
